name: Malvira (Azienda Agricola)
visitPolicy: advance reservation required; three daily tasting sessions
blurb: Malvira sits on the sandy, right-bank Roero hills directly across the Tanaro from Barolo country, working a terroir that produces aromatic whites and fragrant reds most visitors never seek out. The underground barrel cellar beneath the estate is a proper architectural space, and the Villa Tiboldi agriturismo attached to the property adds the option of a full lunch with wine pairing if you want to make a half-day of it. This is the rare Roero producer with enough structure and hospitality investment to justify a primary stop rather than an afterthought.
